title: OpenRole | AI Career Intelligence Platform
description: Architecting a high-performance career management system that leverages AI-driven endpoints and sophisticated state persistence to automate document optimization. Engineered for massive scale and seamless real-time user interaction.
notes: Focused on persistent state-driven UI and complex fetch-based blob handling for cross-origin document management.

title: FOSAD | Secure Enterprise HR Operations
description: Engineering a robust HRIS solution with rigorous RBAC security and real-time operational tracking. Architected sophisticated multi-step onboarding flows and secure authentication mechanisms to ensure 100% data integrity for enterprise clients.
notes: Implemented automated token refresh and schema validation to maintain high security standards for sensitive employee data.

title: Leban Street | High-Performance E-commerce
description: A revenue-optimized food-tech engine that generated $30,000+ within 60 days of launch. Features a proprietary 'Smart Cart' system with multi-order batching and real-time supply chain visualization to maximize conversion rates.
notes: Optimized checkout flows and integrated location-based delivery fee automation to reduce cart abandonment by 25%.

title: BeautySpace | Scalable Wellness Marketplace
description: Spearheaded a critical architectural migration from legacy React to Next.js, achieving a 40% reduction in Time-to-Interactive (TTI) and a 20% uplift in Core Web Vitals, directly boosting SEO and user retention for a national brand.
notes: Utilized aggressive caching strategies and server-side rendering to resolve historical performance bottlenecks and scale user capacity.
